name: Ubiquiti UniFi Dream Router 7
title: Ubiquiti UniFi Dream Router 7
title_extended: Ubiquiti UniFi Dream Router 7 – WiFi 7 All-in-One Router with UniFi OS
description: The UniFi Dream Router 7 (UDR7) represents a significant advancement in networking technology, designed to meet the evolving demands of modern homes and businesses. As a Wi-Fi 7 (802.11be) router, it offers unprecedented wireless speeds and efficiency, ensuring seamless connectivity for a multitude of devices. With its sleek design and robust feature set, the UDR7 redefines user expectations for network performance and reliability. The UDR7 leverages the latest Wi-Fi 7 technology to deliver exceptional wireless performance across three frequency bands. The 6 GHz band offers speeds up to 5.7 Gbps, the 5 GHz band up to 4.3 Gbps, and the 2.4 GHz band up to 688 Mbps. Each band utilizes a 2x2 MIMO configuration, ensuring efficient data transmission and reception. This tri-band setup not only enhances overall network capacity but also reduces interference, providing a stable and high-speed connection for activities such as streaming, gaming, and video conferencing.

detailed_description.heading: Unmatched Wireless Performance
detailed_description.text: The UniFi Dream Router 7 (UDR7) represents a significant advancement in networking technology, designed to meet the evolving demands of modern homes and businesses. As a Wi-Fi 7 (802.11be) router, it offers unprecedented wireless speeds and efficiency, ensuring seamless connectivity for a multitude of devices. With its sleek design and robust feature set, the UDR7 redefines user expectations for network performance and reliability. The UDR7 leverages the latest Wi-Fi 7 technology to deliver exceptional wireless performance across three frequency bands. The 6 GHz band offers speeds up to 5.7 Gbps, the 5 GHz band up to 4.3 Gbps, and the 2.4 GHz band up to 688 Mbps. Each band utilizes a 2x2 MIMO configuration, ensuring efficient data transmission and reception. This tri-band setup not only enhances overall network capacity but also reduces interference, providing a stable and high-speed connection for activities such as streaming, gaming, and video conferencing.

detailed_description.heading: Comprehensive Network Management
detailed_description.text: The UDR7 offers a suite of network management and security features. It includes a stateful firewall, application-aware Layer 7 firewall, deep packet inspection (DPI), and intrusion prevention systems (IPS/IDS) with over 20,000 signatures powered by CyberSecure. Additionally, the UDR7 supports VLAN and subnet-based traffic segmentation, advanced QoS, dynamic routing with OSPF, and an integrated RADIUS server for granular network control. The UDR7 is fully integrated with the UniFi Application Suite, supporting Network, Protect, Access, Talk, and Connect applications. This integration allows for centralized management of various network functions, simplifying the user experience. The router can manage over 30 UniFi devices and supports more than 300 simultaneous users, making it a scalable solution for growing networks. Whether for a home setup or a small to medium-sized business, the UDR7 provides a comprehensive networking solution.

detailed_description.heading: Versatile Connectivity
detailed_description.text: The UDR7 is equipped with a variety of ports to accommodate diverse networking needs. It features one 10G SFP+ port and one 2.5 GbE RJ45 port for WAN connections, providing flexible options for internet connectivity. For LAN connectivity, it offers three 2.5 GbE RJ45 ports, including one PoE port with a 15.4W budget, allowing for direct powering of compatible devices such as access points or IP cameras. Additionally, the router includes a pre-installed 64GB microSD card for NVR storage, with an expansion slot available for further storage needs. The UDR7 boasts a compact desktop form factor, making it suitable for various environments. It features a 0.96" status display for system information and supports management via Ethernet and Bluetooth, offering flexibility in configuration and monitoring. The internal 50W AC/DC power supply ensures reliable operation, and with a maximum power consumption of 26W (excluding PoE output), the UDR7 is both powerful and energy-efficient.

items.name: Chipset
items.value: Quad-core Arm® Cortex® A53 at 1.5 GHz
